zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide Tylle於1445年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，她的父親Charles Henry Tilley32歲，母親Agnes Johnstone Alexander32歲。她於大約1464年與Nathan Tilley在英國英格蘭貝德福爾特拉爾 貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1520年在英國享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide Tylle于1445年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，她的父亲Charles Henry Tilley32岁，母亲Agnes Johnstone Alexander32岁。她于大约1464年与Nathan Tilley在英国英格兰貝德福爾特拉爾 貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1520年在英国享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: variant of   Tell   1 or 2.
French (mainly Nord): topographic name from Old French teil ‘lime tree, linden’ (from Latin tilia).

variants.name: Tell
meanings: North German: from a pet form of   Dietrich  .
South German: topographic name from Middle High German telle ‘gorge, depression’. The name of the Swiss hero Wilhelm Tell has not been explained.
North German (mainly Westphalia): topographic name from Middle Low German telg(e) ‘branch, twig, undergrowth’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide Tylle was born in 1445, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Charles Henry Tilley, was 32 and her mother, Agnes Johnstone Alexander, was 32. She married Nathan Tilley about 1464, in Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1520, in England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide Tylle est née en 1445, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Charles Henry Tilley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Johnstone Alexander, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Nathan Tilley environ 1464, à Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide Tylleが1445年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父Charles Henry Tilleyは32歳，母Agnes Johnstone Alexanderは32歳であった。約1464年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアセントラル ベドフォードシュアイアでNathan Tilleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide Tylle(이)가 1445년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Henry Tilley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Johnstone Alexander(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 세트럴 베드퍼드실르에서 Nathan Tilley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Nathan Tilley aproximadamente 1464, em Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide Tylle родилась в 1445 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Charles Henry Tilley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Johnstone Alexander, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathan Tilley около 1464 г. в местности кентраль бедфордшир, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 75 лет.
